prompt:
Whimsical kawaii-inspired studio fashion editorial featuring a stunning young Asian woman with long flowing wavy hair and soft side bangs, styled in vibrant pastel goth streetwear with edgy graphic prints and holographic accents. She wears a cropped pastel hoodie layered over high-waist pleated skirts or trendy cargo pants, accessorized with layered chains, statement earrings, pastel platform sneakers, and a cute bucket hat she playfully tilts. Radiant confident smile, dynamic playful poses, lively youthful aura, blending modern Harajuku street fashion with pastel goth and cyber Y2K influences.

Shot inside a bold studio setup with a lavender-to-teal gradient seamless backdrop, soft diffused LED lighting, and futuristic pop-art props. Floating elements include holographic stars, candy shapes, mini vinyl records, retro tech gadgets, neon doodles, and pastel balloons. Rich, dreamy pastel palette with pops of lilac, teal, bubblegum pink, mint, and soft silver. Cozy cropped silhouettes, layered textures, and bold Gen Z styling inspired by Japanese streetwear magazines and digital fashion campaigns.

High-end fashion catalog photography fused with playful editorial aesthetics, ultra-clean image quality, glossy magazine finish, soft natural skin texture, crisp details, and candy-colored yet slightly neon-toned palette. Expressive poses, whimsical movement, Pinterest-ready composition, fashion lookbook energy, modern youth-culture branding vibe, ultra-detailed 8k aesthetic.
Style references: Pastel goth streetwear, edgy kawaii editorial, cyber Y2K fashion, holographic and neon accessories, playful Japanese street fashion, dreamy pop-art studio photography .
